headline: General Mills Extends Ornaments Licensing As Brand Reach Faces Market Pressure
summary: General Mills, NYSE:GIS, is expanding its licensing partnership with Old World Christmas to roll out more branded, hand blown glass ornaments for the upcoming holiday season. The extended collaboration will bring additional iconic General Mills brands into US retail stores, following last year's initial ornament launch. The move reflects General Mills' push to extend its brands into non food categories and deepen consumer engagement through seasonal merchandise. For investors watching...
